zh.lifeSummary: 當Dietrich IX. von Kleve於1291年出生在德國海因里希_海普洛文次可列福時，他的父親Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve36歲，母親Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg20歲。他於1308年與Margareta von Geldern結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1347年7月15日在海因里希_海普洛文次可列福享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dietrich IX. von Kleve于1291年出生在德国海因里希_海普洛文次可列福时，他的父亲Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve36岁，母亲Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg20岁。他于1308年与Margareta von Geldern结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1347年7月15日在海因里希_海普洛文次可列福享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Kleve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Kleve (earlier Cleve) in Lower Rhineland, Westphalia, or Schleswig-Holstein. The placename probably derives from an old topographic term cleve ‘swamp’. Compare Cleve .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads named Kleiva, from Old Norse kleif, klif ‘cliff, rocky ascent with a road or path’.

variants.name: Klever
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Kurt, Ulrike.
German and Dutch: habitational name for someone from Kleve in the Rhineland or Schleswig-Holstein (see   Kleve   1).

German: from Middle Low German klēver ‘clover, meadow’, also ‘resin, turpentine’, hence a metonymic occupational name either for a farmer who grew clover or for someone who collected resin and distilled turpentine. In the Alemannic area this was also a nickname for a bungler. Compare Cleaver and Clever .

variants.name: Kleven
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Berger, Hjalmer, Jalmer, Knute, Maren, Obert, Thor, Thorval.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads all over Norway named Kleven, from the definite singular form of   Kleve  . Compare   Cleven   and   Cleveland  .
Dutch and German: rare variant of   Cleven  .

nameMeanings.name: Dietrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: IX.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

en.lifeSummary: When Dietrich IX. von Kleve was born in 1291, in Kleve, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany, his father, Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve, was 36 and his mother, Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg, was 20. He married Margareta von Geldern in 1308. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 15 July 1347, in Kleve, Rhineland, Prussia, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dietrich IX. von Kleve est né en 1291, à Kleve, Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margareta von Geldern en 1308. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1347, à Kleve, Rhénanie, Prusse, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dietrich IX. von Kleve 1291 in Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve 36 und seine Mutter Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg 20. Er hat 1308 Margareta von Geldern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juli 1347 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich IX. von Kleve è nato il nel 1291 nel Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margareta von Geldern nel 1308. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 15 luglio 1347, nel Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dietrich IX. von Kleveが1291年にドイツプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレブで生まれた時，父Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleveは36歳，母Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburgは20歳であった。1308年にMargareta von Geldernと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1347年7月15日にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレブで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dietrich IX. von Kleve(이)가 1291년 독일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 클브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1308년 Margareta von Geldern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1347년 7월 15일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 클브에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich IX. von Kleve nasceu em 1291, em Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margareta von Geldern em 1308. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de julho de 1347, em Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dietrich IX. von Kleve родился в 1291 г. в местности клив, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margareta von Geldern в 1308 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 15 июля 1347 г. в местности клив, раинпровинз, Пруссия в возрасте 56 лет.

sm.1310-1347: mai le 1310 e o'o I le 1347

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dietrich IX. von Kleve nació en 1291, en Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margareta von Geldern en 1308. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de julio de 1347, en Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, a la edad de 56 años.
